source_pr.title: stats: add average column size for the histogram
source_pr.body:
For fixed-length data types, such as Int and DateTime, the _avg_col_size_ will equal to the fixed-length. For variable-length data types, such as varchar, it will equal to the average column size in bytes.
#4800 
PTAL @lamxTyler @coocood

symptoms: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
